name: signupgenius-mcp
description: SignUpGenius MCP — read sign-ups, slot reports, and groups; add group members. Three auth paths: Pro API key, email/password, or sign in via the fetchproxy browser extension.

signupgenius_email.title: Email (session mode)
signupgenius_email.description: SignUpGenius login email. Pair with the password below to enable session mode — works on free accounts and supports every tool except slot reports. Direct email/password accounts only (no Google/Apple/Facebook/Microsoft SSO, no 2FA). Leave blank to use the fetchproxy browser extension instead.

signupgenius_password.title: Password (session mode)
signupgenius_password.description: SignUpGenius password. Required only when the email above is set. Stored locally in the bundle config — keep it private.

signupgenius_user_key.title: Pro API key (key mode)
signupgenius_user_key.description: SignUpGenius API key from Pro Tools > API Management. Required ONLY for the slot REPORT tools (filled/available/all participants) — those need a Pro subscription. If both this and email/password are set, the key wins.

tools.name: signupgenius_list_groups
tools.description: List groups created by the user

tools.name: signupgenius_get_group_member
tools.description: Get detailed info for a group member

tools.name: signupgenius_add_group_member
tools.description: Add a member to a group (write)

tools.name: signupgenius_list_signedupfor
tools.description: List sign-ups you've signed up for

tools.name: signupgenius_legacy_get_my_signups
tools.description: Session mode: list sign-ups via the SignUpGenius wizard's own endpoint

tools.name: signupgenius_report_all
tools.description: Full report (filled + open slots) for a sign-up (Pro key)

tools.name: signupgenius_report_filled
tools.description: Report restricted to filled slots (Pro key)

tools.name: signupgenius_report_available
tools.description: Report restricted to open slots (Pro key)
